name: London Ambulance Service
description:
The London Ambulance Service dispatches ambulances in emergencies. 
    The key goal is to allocate an available ambulance for every call that can reach the scene within 11 minutes. 
    The entire dispatch process must not exceed a set maximum time limit.

    To make this work, the computer system (CAD) analyzes incident forms and assigns vehicles. 
    It is vital to track the exact location of moving ambulances. 
    This requires staff to follow standard routes and correctly communicate departure and destination, 
    allowing radio operators and the CAD to record data accurately.
highLevelGoals: Allocate an available ambulance for every emergency call to ensure it reaches the scene within 11 minutes.
Facilitate effective communication between the radio operator and the ambulance crew to ensure accurate tracking of ambulance locations and statuses.
Ensure that the ambulance crew can operate effectively and provide timely medical assistance at the scene of emergencies.
Ensure the CAD system is functioning correctly to support efficient dispatch operations and data recording.
Receive and input emergency call details accurately into the system to facilitate timely ambulance dispatch.
lowLevelGoals: Input the details of the emergency call into the system including location, nature of the emergency, and caller information.
Query the system for currently available ambulances that can be dispatched to the emergency location.
Allocate the selected available ambulance to the emergency call and update its status in the system.
Send a status update to the system regarding the ambulance's current location and estimated time of arrival at the scene.
Receive real-time updates from the ambulance crew regarding their status and location during the response.
Administer medical care to the patient at the scene based on the information received from the dispatcher.
Document the patient's condition and treatment provided during the emergency response in the system.
Check system logs and performance metrics to ensure the CAD system is functioning correctly.
Apply necessary updates and patches to the CAD system to maintain its functionality and security.
